sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73278" key="o(loshrikopra/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλο-σηρῐκοπράτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾱ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in Lat. form <sense id="n73278.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">holosericoprata, silkmercer,</tr_> Champollion-Figeac <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Chartes Latines</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1 vi 14</biblScope></bibl>, al. <date TEIform="date">(vi A. D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
